data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Auto-reminders for incomplete items', but the evidence does not confirm that this functionality is implemented. While the linked use case mentions an automated reminder for a specific task, it does not provide concrete API reads or state checks that demonstrate the general capability of sending reminders for all incomplete items. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage, as there is no evidence of a system-wide implementation of auto-reminders for all tasks, only a specific instance is mentioned.
gaps: No evidence of a system-wide implementation of auto-reminders for all incomplete items.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for auto-reminders functionality
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the API can send reminders for all incomplete tasks.
